plans.name: Basic
features: 5 GB NVMe Storage - Supercharge your website with NVMe storage, delivering ultra-fast data access and superior performance. Ideal for high-traffic sites, NVMe ensures swift load times and enhances user experience with its cutting-edge technology.

~10K Monthly Visitors - Your hosting plan is optimized to comfortably handle approximately 10,000 unique visitors per month with LiteSpeed caching enabled. This estimate is based on your plan's CPU, RAM, and Entry Process allocation.
Standard Website Speed - Optimized server performance for reliable website loading speeds. Perfect for small to medium websites with moderate traffic.
2 Domain Hosted - Host multiple domain names on a single hosting account. Each domain can have its own website and email addresses.
Lifetime Free SSL - Secure your website with free SSL certificates that encrypt data between your website and visitors. Essential for e-commerce and data protection.
One Click WordPress Install - Install WordPress with just one click using our automated installer. No technical knowledge required to get your website running quickly.
Unlimited Bandwidth - No limits on data transfer. Your website can handle unlimited visitors and traffic without any additional charges.
Unlimited Email Accounts - Set up unlimited professional email accounts for your domain. Perfect for businesses of any size.
Free .COM Domain - When you sign up for a yearly hosting plan, we'll give you a .COM domain free for the first year. That's domain registration, DNS management, and privacy protection, all included.
Advanced Malware Scanner - Protect your website from viruses, malware, and security threats with our advanced scanning technology. Regular security checks keep your site safe.
24/7 Monitoring By Experts: Our security team monitors server health, suspicious activity, and performance issues around the clock. Problems are detected and fixed before they affect your site.
Daily Virus & Malware Scan: Automated daily scans check every file on your hosting for viruses, trojans, backdoors, and malicious code. Threats are quarantined and you're notified instantly.
Integrated Server Firewall: Web Application Firewall (WAF) that blocks hackers, bots, and malicious traffic before they reach your site. Protects against SQL injection, XSS, and common exploits.
Two-Factor Authentication: Extra login security for your cPanel and emails. Even if someone steals your password, they cannot access your account without the code from your phone.

3 Step DDos Mitigation: Multi-layer DDoS protection: 1) Early detection identifies attacks in seconds, 2) Smart filtering blocks malicious traffic while allowing real visitors, 3) Auto-recovery restores full performance.
Included KernelCare: Live kernel patching that applies critical security updates without rebooting the server. Your site stays protected against the latest vulnerabilities with zero downtime.
Malware Detection: Real-time scanning that catches malware the moment it's uploaded. Infected files are immediately quarantined and you get detailed reports on what was found and cleaned.
24/7 Instant Chat Support: Connect with real humans instantly via live chat anytime, day or night. Average response time under 30 seconds. No bots, no waiting,just helpful experts.
15 Minute Ticket Reply: Support tickets receive first response within 15 minutes on average. Complex issues get escalated to senior engineers for faster resolution.
24/7 Live Call Support: Call us anytime for urgent issues like website downtime or security emergencies. Direct access to technical support,no call centers, no hold music.
24/7 What'sApp Support: Get help right from your phone via WhatsApp. Share screenshots, receive step-by-step instructions, and get issues resolved without leaving your favorite messaging app.
server: 99.9% Uptime Guarantee (We guarantee your website will be online 99.9% of the time. That's less than 9 hours of potential downtime per year. If we fail to meet this, you get service credits.)
1 Core Hosting CPU (Dedicated processing power for your website. Handles thousands of monthly visitors comfortably. Sufficient for blogs, portfolios, and business sites.)
1 GB Hosting RAM (Memory allocated for running your site. Supports WordPress with essential plugins smoothly. Perfect for standard websites without heavy plugins.)
5 MBPS I/O Speed (Disk read/write speed for database queries and file operations. Higher I/O means faster page generation, especially for dynamic content like WooCommerce stores.)

10 EP (Entry Process) (Simultaneous connections your site can handle. 10 Entry Processes supports approximately 10,000 monthly visitors with LiteSpeed caching enabled. Higher EP means more visitors can load pages at the exact same moment.)

50 Max Processes (50 total server processes available for your account. Covers all PHP workers, cron jobs, shell commands, and background tasks running simultaneously. Higher limit means smoother performance under heavy load.)
PhpMyAdmin Tool (Visual database manager to browse, edit, import/export your MySQL databases without writing SQL commands. Essential for WordPress migrations and data management.)
MySQL Database (Industry-standard database system that powers WordPress, WooCommerce, Laravel, and virtually all PHP applications. Fast, reliable, and fully managed by us.)
360 Security with cPGuard (Enterprise security suite that blocks malware, brute-force attacks, SQL injections, and XSS attacks in real-time. Your site is protected 24/7 without you lifting a finger.)
Daily Cloud Backup (Your entire website is automatically backed up daily to secure cloud storage. Restore with one click if anything goes wrong, files, databases, emails, everything.)
7 Days Backup Retention (We keep 7 days of backups so you can restore your site to any point in the past 7 days. One-click restore makes recovery fast and stress-free.)
Multiple Hosting Locations (Choose from 7 strategic server locations to host your site closer to your visitors. Better location = faster loading times and improved SEO rankings.)
Host PHP & Laravel Script (Full support for PHP 7.4 to 8.3 and Laravel framework. Run any PHP script, custom application, or modern Laravel project with Composer and Artisan support.)

comparisons: কম বাজেট থেকে থাকলে Hostfame আর ২৪/৭ এক্সপার্ট সাপোর্ট এবং বেস্ট সার্ভিসের জন্য Hostnin ১০০% রিকমেন্ডেড।
কম প্রাইসে সেরা হোস্টিং এর জন্য Hostfame ভালো হবে। আর বাজেট কিছুটা বাড়াতে পারলে Hostnin বেস্ট হবে।
For a cheaper option, Hostfame is good to start with, but if you prefer something best then Hostnin is 100% recommended.

For affordable performance, go with Hostfame (great for beginners).
But if you want premium speed, uptime, and BDIX connectivity, Hostnin is hands down the best choice.
